items.name: First workload activation blockers
items.description: Find the specific points where startup CTOs and application builders abandon setup before production launch.
questions: Which step causes the first unresolved support ticket?
Which runtime choice is most confusing?
What documentation or console signal would reduce abandoned setup?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.

items.name: Cloud operating control gaps
items.description: Understand why platform and FinOps operators cannot see owner, cost, policy, and SLO coverage across production workloads.
questions: Which owner and tag fields are missing most often?
Which cost anomaly signals arrive too late?
Which policy exceptions are legitimate versus drift?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.

items.name: Data and AI service activation path
items.description: Validate which packaged data and AI paths help customers move from experimentation to production usage.
questions: Which AI use cases need accelerator reservations?
Where do data and AI costs become unclear?
Which governance controls are needed before AI launch?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.
